scope: Clean public-candidate runtime, artifacts, tests, and build configuration across desktop, tablet, and mobile projects.

browser.configurationBoundary: PLAYWRIGHT_CHANNEL overrides the local test browser only; the tracked default remains chrome and the candidate application runtime is unchanged.

intentionalSkips.reason: Six heavy local-OCR/PDF workflows run once on desktop; responsive controls and layouts are covered separately on tablet and mobile.
Four shared keyboard, accessibility, artifact-viewer, and locale mechanics audits run once on desktop.
The full p1 graph is intentionally replaced by its step-list fallback in the two smaller viewport projects.

rawReporter.reason: The public summary preserves exact reporter totals and identity while excluding runner-local absolute paths from the raw JSON.

boundary: This is exact local candidate evidence. It is not deployed-preview Computer Use, anonymous-download verification, a production deployment result, or authorization to push, merge, or deploy.
